description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a dark wood grain finish on three sides and a lighter, textured panel on the back. The front features two sets of double doors, each equipped with small, round handles, suggesting separate upper and lower compartments. The wardrobe's design is simple and functional, with clean lines and a flat top and sides. The wood grain pattern is consistent and gives the piece a warm, classic appearance suitable for both modern and traditional urban interiors. The back panel appears to be made of a different, lighter material, possibly a composite or fiberboard. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, utilitarian piece of furniture designed for storage.
description: A tall, dark wood-grain wardrobe with double doors and round handles, featuring a lighter back panel. Its clean, rectangular design is functional and classic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, flat, dark wood-grain panel with no visible handles or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two sets of double doors with four round handles, highlighting the main access points.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the plain, dark wood-grain side panel.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a single, large, light-colored panel, contrasting with the darker wood sides.
